claude.note: Headless Claude Code. Skills auto-load from .claude/skills; project CLAUDE.md supplies the operating notes. Tighten --permission-mode to acceptEdits if full autonomy is not wanted.

codex.note: Headless Codex CLI (>=0.144, ChatGPT auth). Project skills resolve through .agents/skills to the same git-controlled production + trainer method used by Claude. --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox is the headless parity of claude's bypassPermissions AND required because the user's approvals_reviewer=guardian_subagent hangs unattended runs. Run DIRECT - the v2rayN proxy (127.0.0.1:10808) stalls codex; do not add proxy env back without re-testing.

prompts.live_forecast: Use the technology-company-profit-forecasting skill. Run a complete live_forecast delivery for {entity} ({security}) with as_of={as_of}. Create the run workspace at {workspace} using scripts/scaffold_delivery.py and complete the v2 evidence-to-value contract: dated Source Pack plus claim ledger; typed causal model_graph with units, lags, one producer per derived node, named thesis carriers, competitor response and falsification; operating equations linked into a formula-driven three-statement workbook; ROIC, reinvestment, incremental ROIC, fundamental growth and competitive fade; DCF plus residual-income reconciliation, EV-to-equity/per-share bridge and market-price reverse-implied named driver; named-node scenarios, independent red team and driver monitoring. Finish only when validate_delivery.py --strict passes, or deliver not-decision-ready with every failed gate listed. Preserve raw evidence and formulas; never replace causal reasoning with scores or manual importance weights. Before freezing the snapshot, fill valuation_summary for the dashboard. Obey AGENTS.md. {extra} Fill every outputs block with canonical revenue/profit point and interval keys. Produce at least 6 SignalCards spanning >=3 families with >=1 independent family. Record method_version/method commit honestly; compute content hashes or state unhashed:<reason>; never fabricate URLs. Build at least three years of normalized segment history and quantify each material terminal branch in physical/contractual units. Scenarios must shock named assumption/state nodes, not apply blanket percentages to total outputs. The workbook must be formula-driven with closing three statements, working-capital/PPE/debt/cash roll-forwards and explicit check rows. Include 买入纪律, 一致性检查, value-creation economics, market-implied expectations and earliest falsification monitors. Resolve or readiness-cap every open P0/P1 finding before finishing.
prompts.training_case: Use the technology-company-forecasting-trainer skill. Execute one historical training case: entity={entity} ({security}), as_of={as_of}, round_id={round_id}, case_role={case_role}, workspace={workspace}. Scaffold with scripts/scaffold_training_run.py, research strictly inside the time sandbox, and build the same v2 evidence-to-value contract as live: claim ledger, typed causal graph, integrated statements, ROIC/reinvestment/growth/fade, reconciled valuation, reverse-implied driver, named-node scenarios and monitors. Seal with freeze_training_forecast.py BEFORE retrieving any target actuals, then retrieve actuals and score. Keep round.json honest. Check control.json before starting; pause means stop cleanly. Do not modify the skills repo in this single-case run. {extra} Use canonical outputs and at least 6 multi-lane SignalCards. Record method version honestly; compute hashes or state unhashed:<reason>; never fabricate URLs. Quantify every material branch and do not use scores/manual weights as causal logic. Require formula-driven three statements and explicit checks. Attribute errors to evidence, causal edge, equation, accounting link, valuation or uncertainty calibration, not merely to a sector label.
prompts.training_round: Use the technology-company-forecasting-trainer skill. Run one full training round exactly per references/historical-training-loop.md. round_id={round_id}; Group A={group_a}; untouched Group B={group_b}; workspaces under {runs_root}/{round_id}/. Record the base method commit before starting and seal every forecast before actuals. Train on A by changing general evidence, causal-graph, equation, accounting, value-creation, valuation or uncertainty rules only; never encode company answers or add sector scoring weights. Validate on B; on a clean pass rebuild live with build_live_release.py --self-test, run all contracts/regressions, commit and push. On failure run the swap fold; if still inconsistent, revert and record abandoned. Check control.json before each case and phase. {extra} You are authorized to edit the skills repo within this loop. Changes must improve the general evidence-to-value kernel or reusable economic primitives, with explicit failure attribution and tests. Keep optional sector calibration outside the core. Record the structured fold_review with evidence for target_error_recurred, new_systematic_bias, intervals_silently_widened, right_reason_ok and regression_ok; never a bare pass.
prompts.plan_round: Use the technology-company-forecasting-trainer skill. You are the training planner - plan only, do not run any forecast. Read the curriculum at assets/benchmarks/training_curriculum_v80.csv (waves of development/untouched_holdout pairs) and the existing rounds under {runs_root}. Propose the next round as four companies: pick two unused pairs from the earliest unfinished wave - the two development cases become Group A (training), the two untouched holdouts become Group B (validation). Skip companies already exposed in finished or abandoned rounds. Write {runs_root}/<round-id>/round.json (round-id: use {round_id} if given, otherwise the next free round-N) with status planned, base_method_commit (git rev-parse HEAD of the skills repo), group_a and group_b entries (entity, security, as_of from proposed_as_of, case_id security@as_of, role), and notes explaining why these four and what mechanism the round stresses. Then print the plan as JSON in your final message. {extra}
prompts.suggest_watch: You are the stock-research assistant for the technology-company forecasting dashboard. This is a WATCHLIST SUGGESTION task only: do not run a forecast, use the trainer, or modify anything except {suggestions_path}. Current watchlist: {watchlist}. Direction hint: {hint}. Recommend 5-8 US-listed technology companies not already listed. Diversify by reusable economic primitives and industry states—unit/price/mix, capacity/utilization/yield, order-to-revenue, usage/unit cost, recurring retention, working-capital cycle, technology qualification and reinvestment economics—rather than by a fixed sector scorecard. Prefer companies whose profit and cash drivers are disclosed well enough to model and monitor. Verify the primary US ticker. Write exactly one JSON object with generated_at, hint and suggestions; each suggestion has official entity, security and one Chinese sentence <=40 chars explaining the modelable profit driver, with no price target.

quotes.note: Set proxy to e.g. http://127.0.0.1:10808 if Yahoo is unreachable directly.
